description: The National Malaria Control Programme is planning a mass distribution of Insecticide Treated Nets (ITNs) based on a policy of Universal Coverage (1 net per 1.8 persons). Configure DHIS2 to calculate this automatically by creating a constant named 'ITN Universal Coverage Ratio' with a value of 1.8 and an indicator named 'Projected ITN Needs (Estimated)' that divides the total 'Population' data element by this constant. Create a pivot table visualization named 'ITN Needs Projection by District' showing this indicator for all districts in Sierra Leone for the year 2022. Login credentials: admin / district.
